name: Herb Bean Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine white beans, cucumber, pepper, celery, green onions, and parsley in a large bowl.
2. Toss well with 1/2 cup of the herb dressing.
3. Let stand at room temperature for 1 hour.
4. Steam green beans about 2 minutes or until crisp-tender.
5. Pour 2 tablespoons of dressing over green beans while they are still warm and toss.
6. Arrange white bean mixture, green beans, and tomatoes on lettuce-lined salad plates.
7. Serve with additional dressing.
